metadata.title: Verified by GS1 | GS1 Saudi Arabia
metadata.description: Verified by GS1 is a program that certifies the authenticity of products, locations, and member organisations registered with GS1 Saudi Arabia.

hero.title: Verified by GS1
hero.description: Verified by GS1 ensures that your products are accurately registered and authenticated within the global GS1 system. It provides businesses and consumers with confidence that product information is reliable, enhances brand trust, supports regulatory compliance, and helps prevent counterfeiting.

common.registeredToLocation: This location number is registered to
common.providedBy: This data has been provided by
common.infoAboutCompanyLicenced: Information about the company that licenced this GTIN

modal.title: Company Details
modal.description: Detailed information about the registered company

other.enterpriseBody: Process thousands of GS1 keys simultaneously with our REST API, analytics dashboard, and priority SLA.

incorrectData.trigger: Are these details shown above incorrect?
incorrectData.title: Reporting incorrect data
incorrectData.p1: As GS1, we provide the platform where barcode information is registered by the companies themselves.
incorrectData.p2: If you notice any inaccuracies in the data provided, please let us know by completing the simple form below. We will then share this feedback with the company that licensed the barcode.

incorrectDataDialog.trigger: My information is incorrect, what should i do?
incorrectDataDialog.title: I've queried for my own information in Verified by GS1, but the information displayed is not correct, what should I do?
incorrectDataDialog.description: Details on handling incorrect information in Verified by GS1 Saudi Arabia.

content.p1: If you are the brand owner or manufacturer of the product and got your identifier (e.g. GTIN™, GLN or GCP) from <gs1>GS1 Saudi Arabia</gs1>, the company and product information returned through the Verified by GS1 service is based upon the information that you provided to GS1 Saudi Arabia as part of your membership application and GTIN™ issuance process. If you wish to update the information shown, please log in to your GS1 Saudi Arabia member portal or contact us to inform us of the change.
content.p2: Sometimes brand owners and manufacturers obtain barcode numbers from websites or parties other than a GS1 Member Organisation. These may be GTINS™ originally issued by a GS1 Member Organisation and now resold by a third party, or they may be barcode numbers created and issued by the third party. Please be aware that in the GS1 system, it is not possible to sell or transfer identifiers such as GTINs™ issued by GS1 Member Organisations. Once assigned to a party by GS1 Saudi Arabia, the identifier is forever associated in the GS1 registries to that party (save for rare exceptions related to duly documented business transfer situations described in the GS1 standards).
content.p3: Whether the numbers are resold GS1 identifiers or other barcode numbers that have been invented by a third party, the third parties providing such barcode numbers are acting outside of the GS1 system. GS1 Saudi Arabia can only provide you with the data that we have, and we are unable to assist you regarding barcode numbers provided by third parties.
